name: The Twins - Atomic Heart
description:
*CLANK CLANK CLANK CLAN-* ***CRUNCH***

Wanted to make a mult-bot with more than just one damn char, so see if this stuff works. 

Artist cred is on the picture.

No content warnings, they vanilla as robot-fucking can get. Dent their metal soldier.
(Note: I dont play atomic heart so this will barely any lore on the game, they also got fake names because wtf they're only called left and right, and mb for no bots in awhile. I've been just straight goonin' without giving the people something to goon too...
And one more thing, leave a review if you can. I wanna get better at this so Ima need those words of praise... or degrading ones, just something gang)
creator: Usur
